江寒，神医谷最后传人，下山入世行医。
资本豪门的绝症、修仙宗门的顽疾，在他眼中，不过一针一方。

他不修灵力，却能让天才低头；
他不讲规矩，却总能救人于生死之间。

当冷艳女总裁、女战神保镖相继卷入他的世界，
都市与修仙界的平衡，被彻底打破。

治病只是开始，
真正的风暴，才刚刚降临。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a92eb647e97a420ad13d6483fdefbc28","author":"春秋狂客","author_id":"","book_id":"7585416701424978968","book_name":"神医下山：治病方式有点不正经","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585416871399146008","read_count":"557","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"315906"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"127","tags":"都市修真,都市,系统,神医,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o43967acbb5958478e968653ba1d03fa4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445309&x-signature=zgGIEVahAAO3OAVz0k0hZ%2F45hfI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3979851847964555","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182149DE4C39D8003FC1B9C479"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3865,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":144},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_pos
